creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 198300
patch

This port uses -std=gnu++11, so it needs USES=compiler:c++11-lang to build on architectures using GCC in base.

I tested on powerpc64 and amd64, the port partially builds but further on, I get SSL-related error (I have CURRENT with OpenSSL 1.1.1).

On older releases, this should fix build.

Hardware sponsored by IntegriCloud.
